creator: issei@t-cnet.or.jp
text:
I Update my port japanese/tcsh.

	1. Version up original tcsh from 6.07.02 to 6.07.06
	2. Version up kanji patch (Japnese NLS catalog support patch) from
	   6a to 7b4.
	2. Add ja_JP.SJIS locale NLS catalog support.
	3. Remove non-Japanese NLS catalog support (they should use shells/tcsh
	   instead).

	The main reason of the big diff is:

	1. tcsh 6.07.02 does not suport FreeBSD, so I need many patches.
	2. tcsh 6.07.06 supports FreeBSD and tcsh 6.07.06 has been merged
	   many patch from FreeBSD's port, so I remove these patches from my
	   port.

	The change of this port is not so big as diff file below :-)

Fix: This is tha diff from ports-current.
